zh.lifeSummary: 當Johane Miller於1545年出生在英國戴文可利頓時，她的父親John Miller2歲，母親Anne Winterhay21歲。她於1558年10月28日與John Bartlett在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年7月8日在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johane Miller于1545年出生在英国戴文可利頓时，她的父亲John Miller2岁，母亲Anne Winterhay21岁。她于1558年10月28日与John Bartlett在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年7月8日在英国英格兰戴文可利頓享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Miller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Millar
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Miller  . It is also found in Ireland (especially Antrim).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

variants.name: Milner
meanings: English (northern, especially Yorkshire): variant of Miller , retaining the -n- of the Middle English word milnere ‘miller’.

variants.name: Millward
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): occupational name from Middle English milne-ward, mille-ward ‘keeper of a mill, miller’ (Old English mylen-weard). In southern England and the West Midlands this was a standard medieval term for a miller. Compare Miller .

variants.name: McMiller
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from the occupational byname   Miller  .

nameMeanings.name: Johane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Johane Miller was born in 1545, in Colyton, Devon, England, her father, John Miller, was 2 and her mother, Anne Winterhay, was 21. She married John Bartlett on 28 October 1558, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 July 1594, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Bartlett le 28 octobre 1558, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 juillet 1594, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johane Millerが1545年にイギリスデボンコリトンで生まれた時，父John Millerは2歳，母Anne Winterhayは21歳であった。1558年10月28日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでJohn Bartlettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年7月8日にイギリスイギリスデボンコリトンで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: 영국 워윅실르 워윅 스트 닉홀아스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Johane Miller(이)가 1545년 영국 데폰 코리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Miller(은)는 2세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Winterhay(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1558년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 John Bartlett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johane Miller nasceu em 1545, em Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Miller, tinha 2 anos e sua mãe, Anne Winterhay, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bartlett em 28 de outubro de 1558, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: ст ничолас' чурч, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johane Miller родилась в 1545 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Miller было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Winterhay, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bartlett 28 октября 1558 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 июля 1594 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
